entries.label: Focused Mindoro Phase 1 provenance rerun
entries.description: Separate 2016-2023 pre-spill Mindoro-focused drifter rerun that finalizes the Mindoro-specific recipe-provenance story for B1 using the February-April seasonal ranking subset.
entries.claim_boundary: Focused Mindoro Phase 1 transport-provenance basis for B1; not direct spill-footprint validation.
entries.notes: Mindoro-specific provenance lane only. This does not rewrite the stored March 13 -> March 14 R1 raw-generation history, does not modify legacy 2016 prototype outputs, and now evaluates the full four-recipe family with a GFS completeness preflight while promoting the focused historical winner directly into official B1.

entries.label: Mindoro B1 primary public-validation rerun
entries.description: Promoted March 13 -> March 14 R1 public-validation row using independent March 13 and March 14 NOAA public-observation products while preserving the frozen March 3 -> March 6 case definition and the repo-preserved archive-only March-family outputs.
entries.claim_boundary: Only main Philippine public-observation validation claim for Mindoro B1; March 13 and March 14 are independent NOAA-published day-specific observation products, and interpretation remains neighborhood-scale rather than exact 1 km overlap.
entries.notes: Canonical B1 builder. This supports coastal-neighborhood usefulness, not exact 1 km overlap or universal operational accuracy. This does not delete or relabel the repo-preserved archive-only March-family rows, and the same-case A comparator-support lane stays separate and comparator-only. Public-observation and forcing reruns reuse validated persistent local store files before any remote refetch unless INPUT_CACHE_POLICY=force_refresh is selected.

entries.label: DWH external transfer-validation bundle
entries.description: External-case setup, readiness-gated scientific forcing selection, deterministic transfer validation, ensemble comparison, and comparator-only PyGNOME work on the DWH truth masks.
entries.claim_boundary: Separate external transfer validation against DWH observation masks; not Mindoro recalibration, and PyGNOME remains comparator-only.
entries.notes: Separate external transfer-validation story only. Mindoro remains the main Philippine thesis case; DWH observed masks remain truth; PyGNOME remains comparator-only; current frozen stack is HYCOM GOFS 3.1 + ERA5 + CMEMS wave/Stokes; forcing-readiness stays strict by default unless FORCING_OUTAGE_POLICY=continue_degraded is set explicitly. DWH case inputs and scientific forcing now persist under data/local_input_store/... and reruns reuse validated local files before any remote refetch unless INPUT_CACHE_POLICY=force_refresh is selected.

entries.claim_boundary: Broader regional reference/governance lane only; it does not replace focused Mindoro Phase 1 provenance.
entries.notes: Scientific rerun only. This broader regional lane is preserved for reference/governance context and does not overwrite config/phase1_baseline_selection.yaml, does not auto-run phase1_audit or phase5_sync, and fails hard by default if a forcing-provider outage removes part of the official recipe family. Its monthly drifter and forcing inputs persist under data/historical_validation_inputs/... and reruns reuse that validated local store before any remote refetch unless INPUT_CACHE_POLICY=force_refresh is selected.

entries.label: Experimental Mindoro March 9-12 multi-source archive lane
entries.description: Archive-only March 9 -> March 11/12 and March 11 -> March 12 public-observation experiment using vector-first Terra MODIS, ICEYE, and WorldView-3 masks, with PyGNOME comparator-only finalization.
entries.claim_boundary: Experimental multi-source March 9-12 lane only; does not replace B1, Track A, DWH, final validation, publication figures, or any thesis-facing validation claim.
entries.notes: Hidden experimental-only launcher entry. Writes only to output/CASE_MINDORO_RETRO_2023/experiments/mar09_11_12_multisource, resolves the adopted B1 forcing recipe from existing config/manifests without Phase 1 or drifter ingestion, stops with missing_forcing_manifest.json if March 9-12 local forcing is unavailable, downloads nothing unless ALLOW_MINIMAL_CASE_FORCING_FETCH=1 is explicitly set for the bounded March 8 evening to March 13 case window, and runs no model unless RUN_MINDORO_MAR09_12_MULTISOURCE_EXPERIMENT=1 is explicitly set. Caps OpenDrift/PyGNOME runs at 5,000 elements/particles, preserves individual March 12 source masks before union/dissolve, labels PyGNOME as comparator-only, snapshots protected outputs, and explicitly does not replace the current B1 thesis-facing validation claim.

steps.description: Search local forcing stores, optionally stage valid aliases/subsets in the experiment forcing directory, and stop before any model run
Ingest vector-first March 9/11/12 observation masks, preserve individual March 12 sources, build the March 12 union, and stop without forcing or model execution
Dry-run gate first; run OpenDrift deterministic and 50-member ensemble products only when RUN_MINDORO_MAR09_12_MULTISOURCE_EXPERIMENT=1 is set
Run comparator-only PyGNOME products and finalize the 12-row FSS scorecards, figures, manifests, and README

entries.notes: Experimental-only launcher entry. Requires the stored canonical/source support artifacts to already exist; if they do not, the experiment will block rather than rerun thesis-facing support tracks.

entries.label: Prototype 2016 legacy bundle
entries.description: Historical legacy-only prep, Phase 1/2, Phase 3A PyGNOME comparator package, legacy Phase 4 weathering/fate analysis, and the curated final paper-figure export.
entries.claim_boundary: Legacy 2016 support/archive only; debug/regression lane, not a current primary validation path, and PyGNOME remains comparator-only.
entries.notes: Backward-compatible legacy debug/regression path only. Not the preferred debug lane and not the final Chapter 3 Phase 1 study. Prototype prep now attempts GFS too, but missing GFS remains best-effort and does not collapse the legacy bundle. The visible thesis-facing legacy flow is Phase 1 -> Phase 2 -> Phase 3A -> Phase 4 -> Phase 5; the scientific rerun chain stops at Phase 4 and the bundle finishes with the read-only prototype_legacy_final_figures export. Repo-wide phase5_sync remains a separate cross-repo packaging layer. The PyGNOME similarity step is transport-only, comparator-only, and now surfaces deterministic plus p50/p90 legacy support tracks. There is no thesis-facing prototype_2016 Phase 3B or Phase 3C.
